gauge.name: Yellowstone River at Corwin Springs

impacts.statement: Flooding begins to affect trailers along the river.
Brushland and adjacent prairie are in flood.
The river has reached bankfull with minor flooding of brushland and prairie.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice during winter months.
River forecasts will be issued for this location when the water level reaches 1.5 feet from flood stage.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
